_publications._publicationTitle: Identification of erythrocyte p55/MPP1 as a binding partner of NF2 tumor suppressor protein/Merlin.

_contextSnippet: This monoclonal antibody termed 2G4 is specific for p55 MAGUK, recognizes human/rat/mouse antigens...reacted only with the GST-GUK domain of p55 but not with the GUK domains of hDlg, CASK, and ZO-1
details: Monoclonal antibody 2G4 is specific for p55 MAGUK, recognizes human/rat/mouse antigens, and reacted only with the GST-GUK domain of p55 but not with the GUK domains of hDlg, CASK, and ZO-1
